scripts.build: npm run build -w @stelis/contracts && npm run build -w @stelis/core-relay && npm run build -w @stelis/core-api && npm run build -w @stelis/sdk && npm run build -w @stelis/app-api && npm run build:app-web && npm run build:app-admin && npm run build -w @stelis/mcp-server
scripts.build:onchain-benchmark: npm run build -w @stelis/contracts && npm run build -w @stelis/core-relay && npm run build -w @stelis/core-api && npm run build -w @stelis/sdk
scripts.build:app-api:deploy: npm run build -w @stelis/contracts && npm run build -w @stelis/core-relay && npm run build -w @stelis/core-api && npm run build -w @stelis/app-api
scripts.verify:move: sui move test --path packages/contracts/move && sui move build --path packages/contracts/move
scripts.release:check: npm run verify:move && npm run verify:settlement-contract && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm --workspace @stelis/core-api run test:redis && npm --workspace @stelis/app-api run test:redis
